topics.title: Brain Network Structure, Connectivity, and Cognition
topics.description: This cluster centers on how structural and functional properties of brain networks relate to cognition and cognitive impairment across human studies. It emphasizes connectivity, network topology, coupling, and dynamic organization in health and disease.

topics.title: Normative Brain Aging in Alzheimer Risk
topics.description: This cluster centers on normative approaches to brain aging and their links to cognitive decline and dementia risk across the lifespan. It emphasizes Alzheimer-related biomarkers and structural brain measures in aging and preclinical disease.

topics.title: High-Resolution fMRI and Functional Mapping
topics.description: These studies focus on advanced fMRI approaches for mapping brain function, including high-resolution acquisition, resting-state connectivity, and precision localization. They also address signal quality, motion, and vascular effects that influence functional interpretation.

topics.title: Diffusion MRI of Parkinsonian Microstructure
topics.description: Studies in this cluster examine Parkinson-related neurodegeneration using diffusion MRI and related measures of white matter and microstructural integrity. The abstracts emphasize substantia nigra and early disease markers, including isolated REM sleep behavior disorder and structural connectivity changes.

topics.title: EEG Dynamics in Brain States and Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on EEG and electrophysiological measures of brain dynamics across states such as sleep, consciousness, and resting activity. It also includes work on neurological disorders and brain signal complexity, especially microstates and related cortical interactions.

topics.title: Neural Mechanisms of Emotion and Anxiety
topics.description: This cluster focuses on neural correlates of emotion regulation, fear, anxiety, and reward-related processing across diverse affective and clinical contexts. It also includes work on interoception, neural representation, and functional connectivity in disorders such as misophonia and major depressive disorder.

topics.title: Deep Learning for Brain MRI Segmentation
topics.description: This cluster centers on deep learning approaches for brain MRI analysis, especially automated segmentation, atlas-based modeling, and cortical folding characterization. It also includes newer generative and foundation-model methods for improving reconstruction, resolution, and structural analysis in 3D neuroimaging.

topics.title: Adolescent Stress, Depression, and Neurodevelopment
topics.description: This cluster focuses on how early life adversity, trauma, and resilience relate to adolescent psychopathology, especially depression, PTSD, and suicidal ideation. It also examines neurodevelopmental vulnerability and sex-related differences in risk during adolescence.

topics.title: Depression Treatments and Brain Connectivity
topics.description: This cluster centers on depression-related disorders, especially treatment-resistant depression, and their clinical management using psychotherapy, neuromodulation, and psilocybin. It also highlights brain connectivity measures involving prefrontal regions and treatment efficacy.

topics.title: Neural Decoding and Representation in fMRI
topics.description: This cluster focuses on using fMRI and deep learning to decode neural information, model brain representations, and capture spatiotemporal dynamics in the human visual cortex. It also includes work on biologically constrained models and predictive evaluation of brain-based signals.

topics.title: Language Processing and Lateralization in Multilinguals
topics.description: This cluster focuses on how language processing, speech, and reading are organized in the brain, especially in multilingual and bilingual speakers. It emphasizes developmental differences, language lateralization, and related cognitive factors such as attentional control and cognitive flexibility.

keywords: biophysical large scale brain circuit models
topics.title: Brain Dynamics and Attractor-Based State Modeling
topics.description: This cluster centers on how brain states and dynamics are modeled across conditions such as sleep and propofol anesthesia, often using attractor-based and network-level frameworks. It links brain dynamics to behavior and state transitions through computational and biophysical models.

topics.title: Motor Cortex and Pain in Neurological Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on how brain stimulation and fMRI are used to study pain, motor cortex function, and related neural circuitry in conditions such as stroke, chronic pain, and trigeminal neuralgia. It also includes work on precision mapping and cortical mechanisms underlying perception and recovery.

topics.title: Genetic Architecture of Brain and Mental Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on genetic and transcriptomic influences on human brain structure and neuroanatomy across neuropsychiatric disorders. It emphasizes genome-wide analysis and mapping of brain features linked to schizophrenia, bipolar disorder, depression, and related disease processes.

topics.title: Neural Dynamics of Memory and Attention
topics.description: This cluster centers on how neural dynamics and neural correlates support attention, working memory, cognitive control, and memory processes in the human brain. It also includes studies on hippocampus-related mechanisms, social perception, and reactivation in distributed networks.

topics.title: Machine Learning in Brain Prediction Studies
topics.description: This cluster focuses on using neuroimaging data and machine learning to predict brain-related outcomes, including age, behavior, cognition, and depression severity. It emphasizes fMRI, functional connectivity, and cortical measures across diverse datasets and prediction tasks.

topics.title: Brain Development and Connectivity Across Ages
topics.description: This cluster centers on neurodevelopment from fetal and infant stages through adolescence, with emphasis on structural maturation, white matter microstructure, and brain connectivity. It also includes links between these brain changes and cognitive outcomes in preterm and other developing populations.

topics.title: Open Neuroimaging Infrastructure and BIDS Workflows
topics.description: This cluster centers on open, collaborative neuroimaging infrastructure for data organization, conversion, and workflow automation. It emphasizes BIDS-based standards, cloud-enabled tool integration, and practical workflows for neuroimaging research and clinical use.

keywords: abnormal functional hierarchy development during childhood in autism
topics.title: Functional Brain Development Across Ages and Autism
topics.description: This cluster centers on how brain functional networks and connectivity reorganize across childhood, adolescence, and the lifespan, with emphasis on developmental trajectories and age-related plasticity. It also includes autism-related alterations in functional hierarchy and network development.

topics.title: Neuroimaging and Psychosis-Related Brain Alterations
topics.description: This cluster centers on schizophrenia and broader psychosis-spectrum disorders, with related findings in bipolar disorder, MDD, and long covid. The abstracts emphasize brain structure, connectivity, and metabolic alterations linked to symptoms and cognitive deficits.

keywords: hypoperfusion loadings for outcome prediction in acute ischemic stroke
early parietofrontal connectivity predicts visuomotor recovery after stroke
topics.title: Stroke Network Disconnection and Recovery
topics.description: This cluster centers on how stroke-related lesions and network disconnection shape motor, language, and functional recovery. It emphasizes connectome and connectivity markers for predicting outcomes and identifying compensatory pathways after acute ischemic stroke.

topics.title: Epilepsy Localization and Network Mapping
topics.description: This cluster centers on identifying seizure onset and epileptogenic zones in epilepsy, especially focal epilepsy, using invasive and multimodal network-based approaches. It emphasizes connectome analysis, electric source imaging, and stimulation-evoked mapping to improve localization and causal understanding.

topics.title: Autistic Brain Connectivity and Heterogeneity
topics.description: This cluster centers on autism spectrum disorder across development, emphasizing brain connectivity, heterogeneous neural alterations, and links to behavior and symptoms. It includes studies of resting and task-based functional connectivity, cerebello-cortical and cortico-striatal circuits, and associations with sensory, repetitive, and emotional features.

keywords: brain state dynamics during emotional reflection
topics.title: Hormonal and Metabolic Brain Dynamics
topics.description: This cluster centers on how menstrual and menopausal transitions, hormones, and neurosteroids relate to brain metabolism, connectivity, and emotional processing. It also includes studies of alcohol exposure, blood-brain barrier effects, and multimodal neuroimaging markers.

keywords: multivariate bayesian inversion for trial wise decoding
topics.title: Dynamic Connectivity and Bayesian Brain Modeling
topics.description: This cluster centers on methods for estimating and interpreting dynamic brain connectivity from fMRI and MEG data, including spectral dynamic causal modeling and hidden Markov approaches. It also includes decoding and inversion techniques for extracting time-varying functional organization from limited or short task-based datasets.

keywords: choroid plexus volume mediates the link between insomnia severity and memory impairment
topics.title: Sleep Disturbance and Brain Connectivity
topics.description: This cluster centers on how sleep disturbances relate to memory impairment, brain structure, and functional connectivity across development and longitudinal change. It also includes work on sleep characteristics such as continuity, duration, and social jetlag as potential markers of brain and cognitive outcomes.

topics.title: Social Brain Dynamics and Affective Processing
topics.description: This cluster centers on how brain activity supports social interaction, emotion, memory, and synchrony during naturalistic behavior and communication. It also includes interoceptive and allostatic mechanisms, with emphasis on network-level dynamics and individual differences.

keywords: functional mri compatible cortical wide field fluorescent
topics.title: Optical and MRI Perfusion Imaging of Ischemia
topics.description: This cluster centers on imaging approaches for tracking cerebral perfusion, blood flow, and oxygenation during ischemic injury and recovery. It also includes modeling and optical neuroimaging methods used to assess salvageable tissue and monitor progression.

topics.title: Neuroimaging Signatures of Tinnitus and Cognition
topics.description: This cluster centers on brain and EEG abnormalities linked to tinnitus, including phantom sound perception, altered signal propagation, and functional connectivity changes. It also spans broader neuroimaging and cognitive findings such as connectome fingerprints, metastability, and P300-related abnormalities across clinical conditions.

topics.title: Dynamic Brain Organization in Naturalistic States
topics.description: This cluster centers on large-scale neural dynamics and representations during naturalistic conditions, including long-term changes, functional connectivity, and similarity structure. It also links these patterns to altered states and clinical contexts such as psilocybin, schizophrenia, and psychosis.

topics.title: Brain Connectivity Mapping Methods
topics.description: This cluster centers on methods for representing and analyzing brain connectivity, including multilayer network models, hyperbolic embedding, and tools for mapping white matter bundles. It also includes signal-quality and imaging-related terms relevant to connectivity studies and epilepsy.

keywords: 3d cranial implant use existing hospital imaging
brain protection low cost 3d cranial implant
topics.title: Cortical Structure, Folding, and Brain Mapping
topics.description: This cluster centers on studies of cortical folding and cortical structure, including relationships with GABA receptor density and genetic mapping resources such as the Julich Brain. It also includes related imaging and clinical applications involving brain images, face de-identification, and low-cost cranial implant planning.

topics.title: Resting Brain Function and Clinical Modulation
topics.description: Studies focus on resting-state brain responses, functional connectivity changes, and their modulation in clinical and experimental contexts. Topics include APOE-related cognition, Parkinson disease, mind-wandering phenomenology, and interventions such as exercise artificial gravity and bed rest.

topics.title: Neuroimaging and lesion mapping in neuropsychiatric disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on neuroimaging and lesion-based approaches used to study brain-behavior relationships across neuropsychiatric and dementia-related conditions. It includes disconnection mapping, standardized imaging efforts, and applications to disorders such as body representation disorder and hoarding disorder.

keywords: a quantitative comparative analysis of fiber bundles
topics.title: Comparative Analysis of Fiber Bundles
topics.description: This cluster centers on quantitative comparison of fiber bundles, including analysis methods and related test conditions. It also includes work involving anisotropic diffusion phantom data.

keywords: gradient base machine learning reveal biomarkers of auditory hallucinations
topics.title: Biomarkers and Neurofeedback in Auditory Hallucinations
topics.description: This cluster centers on auditory hallucinations in schizophrenia, with emphasis on identifying biomarkers and related neurocircuitry. It also includes machine learning and high-strength fMRI neurofeedback approaches used to reveal or modulate these phenomena.

keywords: the reinforcement sensitivity theory latent mri systems
topics.title: Reinforcement Sensitivity and Brain Volume in Rats
topics.description: This cluster centers on reinforcement sensitivity theory and its relationship to longitudinal brain volume measures, including sex-related effects and measurement invariance. The included studies also involve Wistar rat models and dominance status.

topics.title: Glioma survival and network signatures
topics.description: Research in this cluster centers on diffuse glioma prognosis, including survival prediction and outcome. It also highlights MEG-based network signatures and white matter interactions as factors related to disease burden.

topics.title: Alpha Oscillations and Functional Connectivity
topics.description: This cluster centers on how alpha oscillation patterns and functional connectivity vary across task condition. The abstracts appear to examine neural dynamics in relation to different experimental contexts.

topics.title: Depression and Inflammation Links
topics.description: This cluster centers on depressive disorder, especially major depressive disorder, and its association with peripheral inflammation. It also includes work on glymphatic function in relation to depression-related biological changes.

topics.title: Machine Learning for Parkinsonian Disorder Classification
topics.description: This cluster centers on using machine learning approaches and brain atlas-based features to classify parkinsonian disorders. The work appears focused on diagnostic or subtype discrimination in neuroscience datasets.

topics.title: Neural Dynamics in Preschool Storybook Reading
topics.description: This cluster centers on how storybook reading and novel word exposure in preschool children relate to neural dynamics. It appears to involve educational interactions with teachers and language learning in early childhood.

keywords: topological signatures of neural representation transfer during face communication
topics.title: Neural Representation in Face Communication
topics.description: This cluster centers on how neural representations are transferred during face communication, with emphasis on identifying topological signatures associated with this process. The abstracts appear to focus on the brain dynamics and representational structure underlying social face-based interaction.

topics.title: Brain Map Spatial Analysis Methods
topics.description: Studies focused on analyzing brain map data using spherical projection and spin test approaches. The cluster emphasizes spatial comparison methods and related effects in neuroscience research.

topics.title: Human Subcortical Fear Pathways
topics.description: This cluster centers on human subcortical fear circuitry and its characterization through high resolution tractography. The abstracts emphasize anatomical pathways and related subcortical structures involved in fear processing.

topics.title: Deep Learning Tractography of Rare Cortical Connectivity
topics.description: This cluster centers on tractography approaches for studying rare cortical connectivity. It also includes data driven method development and deep learning applications for analyzing neural pathways.

keywords: topological spreading of pain encoding brain regions
topics.title: Topological Spread of Pain Encoding Regions
topics.description: This cluster concerns how pain-related brain regions are organized and how their activity spreads across the network. It focuses on the topology of pain encoding in the brain rather than on a specific experimental method.

topics.title: EMG Acquisition and Denoising in MRI
topics.description: This cluster focuses on electromyography signal acquisition and denoising, especially in the MRI environment. It emphasizes handling EMG data under imaging-related constraints.

topics.title: Epileptogenic Cortical Malformations
topics.description: This cluster centers on epileptogenic malformations of cortical development and related aspects of cortical development. It also includes prevalence and radiological reports as supporting clinical and imaging context.

topics.title: Parkinson Disease and Neurodegenerative Progression
topics.description: This cluster centers on Parkinson disease and related pathophysiological changes, including striatal dopamine depletion and cerebral hypoperfusion. It also reflects work on staging the progression of these neural abnormalities.

topics.title: Brainstem Network Reconfiguration in Thermoregulation
topics.description: This cluster centers on how the cerebral brainstem network changes during thermoregulatory challenge. It emphasizes functional reconfiguration in response to temperature-related demands.

topics.title: fMRI Signal Coregistration Problems
topics.description: This cluster concerns issues affecting fmri signal quality, especially coregistration signal loss and related subtle imperfection. It appears to focus on identifying a problem and possible solution in image alignment and signal preservation.

topics.title: Functional Connectivity and Brain Stimulation Targets
topics.description: This cluster centers on functional connectivity analysis and related wavelet-based approaches in neuroscience. It also emphasizes identifying reliable brain stimulation targets.

keywords: allen mouse brain connectome quality control downstream impact
topics.title: Allen Mouse Connectome and Neurodegeneration Modeling
topics.description: This cluster centers on the Allen mouse brain connectome and related quality control considerations affecting downstream analyses. It also includes modeling approaches for neurodegeneration in neuroscience research.

topics.title: Age-Related MEG Spectral Analysis Methods
topics.description: This cluster centers on MEG spectral power and analytical approaches for characterizing neural data. It also includes age related changes as a biological context for interpreting these measurements.

topics.title: Spatial Modeling of White Matter Lesion Regression
topics.description: This cluster centers on spatial modeling approaches applied to white matter lesion regression in neuroscience research. It suggests work focused on characterizing lesion changes across brain regions rather than on a general imaging method alone.
